_comment: AdapterRegistry — maps adapter_id (resolved by donut_adjudicator::adapter_id_for_outcome) to the EVM addresses that receive the 70% / 20% donut shares. Loaded at solver-main boot by AdapterRegistry::load_default(). Public mirror served at GET /api/donut/registry. The 'ecosystem' address receives the 10% ecosystem share and ALSO catches the 70% + 20% fallthrough when a fill routes through an adapter not listed here (fail-closed). Replace the placeholder addresses below with real EVM addresses owned by the Builder + reviewer set of each adapter under TSUL.

mayan-solana-swift-v1._note: Mayan Swift program on Solana (the Anchor program at src/protocol-adapters-solana/src/mayan_solana.rs). Routes Mayan auctions where EITHER src or dst is Solana.

mayan-evm-swift-v1._note: Mayan Swift EVM contract path — EVM-source and EVM-destination only.

mayan-flash-solana-v1._note: Mayan Flash LP program on Solana (src/protocol-adapters-solana/src/mayan_flash.rs). Distinct Anchor program from Swift — different Builder.

wormhole-ntt-solana-v1._note: Wormhole NTT (Native Token Transfer) Solana program. Used on EVM→Solana fills via Guardian VAA relay.

debridge-dln-solana-v1._note: deBridge DLN destination program on Solana (chain id 100_000_001). Distinct from the EVM DLN destination contract.

debridge-dln-v1._note: deBridge DLN destination contract — EVM-destination path.

lifi-meta-v2._note: LiFi meta-router — sub-attribution happens inside LiFi's off-chain accounting; we treat the meta-router as a single Builder for donut purposes.
